name: polish-code-base
description: Use this skill to walk through an existing code base and fix surface-level problems that are obvious on a careful read: typos, grammar mistakes in comments and strings, inconsistent naming or formatting, dead imports, stale references, broken links, mismatched casing, and small contradictions between neighboring files. Stay on the visible layer — do not refactor logic, do not run unit tests, and do not chase deep design issues. Apply each fix directly when it is obvious, and report borderline cases for the author to decide.
